is the highest honor given to the most outstanding horse in [Japanese](/wiki/Japan "Japan") [thoroughbred horse racing](/wiki/Thoroughbred_horse_racing "Thoroughbred horse racing"). It is awarded annually by the [Japan Racing Association](/wiki/Japan_Racing_Association "Japan Racing Association") (JRA).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Japanese thoroughbred horse racing award

The **Japanese Horse of the Year** is the highest honor given to the most outstanding horse in [Japanese](/wiki/Japan "Japan") [thoroughbred horse racing](/wiki/Thoroughbred_horse_racing "Thoroughbred horse racing"). It is awarded annually by the [Japan Racing Association](/wiki/Japan_Racing_Association "Japan Racing Association") (JRA).
Since 1987 the honor has been part of the [JRA Awards](/wiki/JRA_Award "JRA Award"). This award originally started as part of the Keishū Sha Awards in 1954 and since 1972 part of the Yūshun Awards.

## Award recipients

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Japanese_Horse_of_the_Year&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Award recipients")]

Includes recipients of the award from 1954 to 1972, which was when the JRA Awards was called the Keishū Sha Awards.

## Multiple Year Horses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Japanese_Horse_of_the_Year&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Multiple Year Horses")]

The following horses were awarded more than once.

* [Shinzan](/wiki/Shinzan "Shinzan") – *1964, 1965*
* Speed Symboli – *1967, 1970*
* Hoyo Boy – *1980, 1981*
* [Symboli Rudolf](/wiki/Symboli_Rudolf "Symboli Rudolf") – *1984, 1985*
* [Symboli Kris S](/wiki/Symboli_Kris_S "Symboli Kris S") – *2002, 2003*
* [Deep Impact](/wiki/Deep_Impact_(horse) "Deep Impact (horse)") - *2005, 2006*
* [Vodka](/wiki/Vodka_(horse) "Vodka (horse)") – *2008, 2009*
* [Gentildonna](/wiki/Gentildonna "Gentildonna") – *2012, 2014*
* [Kitasan Black](/wiki/Kitasan_Black "Kitasan Black") – *2016, 2017*
* [Almond Eye](/wiki/Almond_Eye "Almond Eye") – *2018, 2020*
* [Equinox](/wiki/Equinox_(horse) "Equinox (horse)") - *2022, 2023*
